message:
feat(plan): obligation flow analysis and checked rewrite application

Obligation flow analysis (analysis.rs):
- Add ObligationFlow struct for detailed obligation tracking
- Track which obligations may be reserved, must be resolved, or leak
  on cancellation at each plan node
- Provides richer diagnostics than simple yes/no ObligationSafety

Checked rewrite application (rewrite.rs):
- Rename apply_rule → apply_rule_unchecked, add apply_rule_checked
- apply_rule_checked validates side conditions on a scratch copy
  before mutating the real DAG
- Implement new rules: JoinAssoc, RaceAssoc, JoinCommute, RaceCommute,
  TimeoutMin

This enables safe term rewriting with compile-time verification that
rewrites preserve semantic properties.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
